mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of instances when UNRATE rises > 0.2pp month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, which translates to higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases coincide with negative 20-day SPX returns in > 60% of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects sustained economic momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 5-day SPX direction across a 5-year out-of-sample test with t-statistic below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price inflation above 2.8% forces expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL readings above 2.8% are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in > 65% of cases over a rolling 4-year evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly retail sales validates robust aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS yields a negative or insignificant coefficient in a multivariate regression of 20-day SPX returns.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle signals supply-side bottlenecks and earnings pressure, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening cycles are followed by positive 5-day SPX returns in > 50% of instances across a 3-year walk-forward test.
